scope: ACL 2027 supplement page-1 first-page evidence quickstart v2 visual iteration

motivation.target_page_before: The first-page quickstart pass improved the opening, but the later full supplement density audit still made page 1 one of the sparsest non-reference pages.
motivation.goal_alignment: Use more registered render media in the first viewport while keeping the AI-generated reading compass exposition-only.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, used for sparse-page raster review.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90.

claim_boundary.paper_use: first-page visual reading guide for the supplement evidence gates
claim_boundary.notes: The v2 reading-compass AI slot is not a render result, metric, model prediction, VLM run, navigation run, benchmark row, or new evidence source. The evidence-bearing lanes and opening render ladder are deterministic crops or pair tiles from registered proxy, GRScenes, material-effect, and InternNav media.

reading_compass_v2.role: AI-generated reading-compass schematic only; deterministic figure code draws critical labels, source categories, and claim-boundary text.

final_figure.local_visual_evidence: The standalone v2 card is visibly denser than v1, adds a registered opening render ladder, and keeps the AI-generated compass at the bottom as exposition. The material-emission tile is pale but functions as a material-limit cue rather than a blocking blank panel.

pdf_review.local_visual_evidence: Rendered page 1 now fills the right-column opening with a taller quickstart card, a render ladder, and the first-page caption without visible overlap or spill. Pages 2 and 3 remain readable after the taller opening figure.

layout_iterations.change: Updated the layout regression tests to require the registered opening render ladder, a 0.72 textheight include cap, a v2 AI slot source, and a taller dense output.
layout_iterations.result: RED first: the focused first-page tests failed before the generator, manifest, and LaTeX changes.

layout_iterations.change: Generated the v2 reading-compass AI slot and rewired the manifest and source registry to the v2 slot.
layout_iterations.result: Selected: the AI slot is visually denser than v1, text-free enough for deterministic relabeling, and remains exposition only.

layout_iterations.change: Rebuilt the quickstart at 920x1580 with four-tile evidence lanes and a registered opening render ladder.
layout_iterations.result: Selected: standalone layout-guard active fraction is 0.400189185 and page-1 active245 at 90 dpi rises from 0.121222203 to 0.146943536.

tests.result: RED before implementation: failed on the missing opening-render-ladder phrase and missing v2 slot source; GREEN after implementation: 2 passed, 72 deselected.
completed; regenerated fig_supplement_first_page_evidence_quickstart.png from the v2 composer.
completed during layout review; paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf contains 45 A4 pages.
completed; pages 1-3 regenerated for local visual review.
completed; pages 1-3 regenerated for density review.
GREEN in the final verification pass: 74 passed.

tests.command: final figure, PDF text, PDF profile, git diff whitespace, and direct final-newline/trailing-whitespace scans
tests.result: exit 0; figure size is 920x1580, figure layout-guard active fraction is 0.400189185, page-1 required caption phrases are present, local-path and author-name leakage checks passed, and touched text files have no trailing whitespace.

review_mode.reason: Local pure visual review was used; no separate clean-room subagent was dispatched because the available subagent tool requires an explicit user request for delegation.
